tool_input.command:
cd /Users/yotamfromm/dev/sefaria/ai-chatbot/server && source venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
import httpx
import uuid
import time
import os
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from loadtest.load_test import _make_user_token, send_chat_request

async def test():
    token = _make_user_token()
    print('Token (first 50 chars):', token[:50] + '...')
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        payload = {
            'userId': token,
            'sessionId': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'messageId': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'text': 'What is Shabbat?',
            'timestamp': int(time.time() * 1000),
        }
        resp = await client.post('http://localhost:8001/api/v2/chat/stream', json=payload, timeout=10.0)
        print('Status:', resp.status_code)
        if resp.status_code != 200:
            print('Body:', resp.text[:500])
asyncio.run(test())
"

tool_input.command:
cd /Users/yotamfromm/dev/sefaria/ai-chatbot/server && source venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
import httpx
import uuid
import os
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from loadtest.load_test import _make_user_token
from datetime import datetime, timezone

async def test():
    token = _make_user_token()
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        payload = {
            'userId': token,
            'sessionId': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'messageId': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'text': 'What is Shabbat?',
            'timestamp': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        }
        resp = await client.post('http://localhost:8001/api/v2/chat/stream', json=payload, timeout=30.0)
        print('Status:', resp.status_code)
        print('Body:', resp.text[:800])
asyncio.run(test())
"

cd /Users/yotamfromm/dev/sefaria/ai-chatbot/server && source venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
import httpx
import uuid
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from loadtest.load_test import _make_user_token
from datetime import datetime, timezone

async def test():
    token = _make_user_token()
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        payload = {
            'userId': token,
            'sessionId': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'messageId': str(uuid.uuid4()),
            'text': 'What is Shabbat?',
            'timestamp': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        }
        r = await client.post('http://localhost:8001/api/v2/chat/stream', json=payload, timeout=30)
        print('Status:', r.status_code)
        print('Body:', r.text[:500])
asyncio.run(test())
"
